headline: A Dividend Portfolio That Pays Double the U.S. Median Household Income
summary: The U.S. median household income runs about $80,000 per year. Double that, and you arrive at $160,000, a figure that represents genuine financial comfort in most American cities. Replacing it entirely with investment income requires capital that varies enormously depending on which yield tier you choose. Why the Yield You Choose Changes Everything Every income ... A Dividend Portfolio That Pays Double the U.S. Median Household Income
